# Paddock

> Personal motorsport companion — F1, MotoGP, WEC, Formula E, WRC, IndyCar, NASCAR, IMSA, DTM and more. Calendar, results, standings, drivers, weekend schedules, and curated champions data across 15 motorsport series.

Paddock is a Progressive Web App at paddock-tracker.com that aggregates 15 motorsport series in one place: race calendars with venue-local session times, weather forecasts, news feeds, results and standings (where curated), and historical champions data going back as far as 1949. Built for fans who follow multiple championships.

## Entry points
- [Home — cross-series next sessions](https://paddock-tracker.com/): Unified weekend timeline across all 15 series.
- [Calendar — every session in date order](https://paddock-tracker.com/calendar): Full chronological calendar, filterable by series.
- [Blog](https://paddock-tracker.com/blog): Analysis, recaps, and opinion across motorsport championships.
- [Changelog](https://paddock-tracker.com/changelog): Recent updates to the site.
- [About](https://paddock-tracker.com/about): What Paddock is and how it is built.

## Series
- [Formula 1](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/f1): Calendar, news, results, standings, drivers, history, rules, champions 1950–2025.
- [MotoGP](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/motogp): Calendar, news, champions 1949–2025.
- [World Endurance Championship (WEC)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/wec): Calendar, news, champions 2012–2025.
- [World Superbike (WSBK)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/wsbk): Calendar, news, champions 1988–2025.
- [Formula E](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/formula-e): Calendar, news.
- [IndyCar](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/indycar): Calendar, news.
- [NASCAR Cup Series](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/nascar-cup): Calendar, news.
- [IMSA SportsCar Championship](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/imsa): Calendar, news, champions 2014–2025.
- [Formula 2 (F2)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/f2): Calendar, news, champions 2005–2025.
- [Formula 3 (F3)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/f3): Calendar, news, champions 2010–2025.
- [DTM](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/dtm): Calendar, news, champions 1984–2025.
- [GT World Challenge](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/gt-world): Calendar, news, champions 2014–2025.
- [World Rally Championship (WRC)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/wrc): Calendar, news, stage timetables.
- [Nürburgring Langstrecken-Serie (NLS)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/nls): Calendar.
- [ADAC Ravenol 24h Nürburgring](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/adac-ravenol-24h): Calendar, past winners.
